x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Sufficient change history allows Now Assist to learn risk patterns, generate accurate change summaries, and provide AI-assisted risk assessments grounded in historical data.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Allow change record volume to accumulate before enabling Now Assist change risk assessment features. Focus on data quality: descriptions, CI association, and closure notes. Target: 500+ change requests in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c69
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Sufficient change history allows Now Assist to learn risk patterns, generate accurate change summaries, and provide AI-assisted risk assessments grounded in historical data.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Change Record Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('change_request');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' change requests created in last 12 months';

    if (total >= 500) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' change requests in the last 12 months. Sufficient history for Now Assist change risk assessment AI learning.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' change requests in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist change risk assessment AI will have limited pattern coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' change requests in the last 12 months. Insufficient change history for meaningful Now Assist change risk assessment AI learning.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000341</number><order>270</order><remediation_guidance>Allow change record volume to accumulate before enabling Now Assist change risk assessment features. Focus on data quality: descriptions, CI association, and closure notes. Target: 500+ change requests in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c69</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Change Record Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c69</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
